Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Institute for Systems Research.

Credit Only Granted for. ENPM647 or ENSE627.

ENSE698 Special Topics in Systems Engineering (3 Credits) Prerequisite: ENSE621; and permission of ENGR-Institute for Systems Research.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ENSE699 Directed Study in Systems Engineering (1-3 Credits) Directed study in Systems Engineering.
